# Daily Note Template

## Daily Note Template

**For Obsidian daily notes:**

```markdown
# {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}} {{date:dddd}}

## 🎯 Today's Focus

- [ ] Must do:
- [ ] Should do:
- [ ] Could do:

## 📚 What I Learned

-

## 💻 What I Built/Coded

-

## 🧩 DSA

| Problem | Difficulty | Pattern | Solved | Time | Notes |
| ------- | ---------- | ------- | ------ | ---- | ----- |
|         |            |         |        |      |       |

## ❓ Questions/Blockers

-

## 🔗 Resources Found

-

## 🌟 Wins

-

## 📋 Tomorrow

-

## 💭 Notes

-
```
